creator: bugzilla@soulrebel.in-berlin.de
text:
Problem solved here.
I now have new Xorg/driver/DRI, KDE4.2 and new DRM vom RELENG_7 so I don't 
know what actually solved the issue, but at least its gone.

NOTE that because of http://bugs.freedesktop.org/show_bug.cgi?id=17638 I can't 
use EXA (I am instead using XAA). Maybe thats the reason the issue is gone.

If they get the Intel-Driver's EXA fixed and the problem reappears I can reopen 
this PR.
